The '''Senate Building''' was the meeting place of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] [[Tapani Senate|Senate]]. It was located in the [[Historical District]] of [[Estalle Island]] on [[Procopia/Legends|Procopia]].

The building was small, confined and drafty but since it was so instilled with the sector's heritage no one dared to suggest that the location be moved to a more comfortable environment.<ref name="LE" />
